description_long: This is a military-style, single-seat jet airplane with a streamlined fuselage and a camouflage paint scheme. The wings are mid-mounted and slightly swept back, with two jet engines mounted under each wing. The tail section features a conventional design with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers. The cockpit is positioned forward on the fuselage and is enclosed with a clear canopy. The landing gear is of the tricycle type, with a single nose wheel and two main wheels under the wings. Distinctive markings, including a white cross and a yellow band, are visible on the rear fuselage.
description: A camouflaged, single-seat military jet airplane with mid-mounted swept wings, underwing engines, and a conventional tail. Features an enclosed forward cockpit and tricycle landing gear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the camouflage pattern, underwing engines, tricycle landing gear, and tail markings.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the nose, cockpit canopy, wing sweep, and the two underwing jet engines.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with clear visibility of the tail and landing gear.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the tail section, horizontal stabilizers, and the alignment of the engines under the wings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with slightly swept wings, no visible winglets, and a straight dihedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted under the wings.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with one nose wheel and two main wheels under the wings.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy.
